title: Gelatin sticks found along PM Modi’s convoy, half hour before he passed by
content: Police have also detained a suspect who made a call to the police control room at around 7:30 a.m. threatening to trigger explosions near HAL Airport and the Art of Living premises during the Prime Minister’s visit.

title: FMCG companies bracing for another round of price increases amid inflation
content: While the companies have already hiked prices by 3%-5%, executives indicate further increase citing inflationary pressure arising from volatile crude oil prices, higher logistics costs, currency depreciation, and disruptions in global supply chains amid geopolitical tensions

title: Karnataka is No 1 in revenue, panchayat services, claims Priyank Kharge
content: The Minister was launching a large-scale distribution drive for revenue department benefits at Dr. S.M. Pandit Rangamandir in Kalaburagi

title: PM Modi assures more support to Telangana, asks CM Revanth to collaborate with him
content: PM Narendra Modi inaugurates or lays foundation stone for Zaheerabad Industrial Park (National Investment and  Manufacuting Zone), IOC terminal at Malkapur, multi-tracking of railway line between Kazipet and Vijayawada and PM Mitra Park in Warangal

title: Tamil Nadu government formation LIVE: TN Assembly to convene first session; Speaker election on May 12
content: Former T.N. Chief Minister Stalin reacts sharply to Mr. Vijay's remarks that DMK government had left State treasury empty with debt burden of ₹10 lakh crore

title: Tension in Kadapa: police take some youths into preventive custody
content: SP says they have taken the youths into custody after identifying them as troublemakers, but no arrests have been made

title: Udhayanidhi Stalin is Leader of Opposition in Tamil Nadu Assembly
content: The 17th Tamil Nadu Assembly is set to witness a political face-off between Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay and Mr. Udhayanidhi Stalin, both of whom have film backgrounds.

title: Environment clearance to Great Nicobar Project given without adequate study: Jairam Ramesh
content: EIA studies on project have used baseline data collected over just a few days and weeks, and are inadequate, says Mr. Ramesh in letter to Environment Minister; wants HPC report to be made public

title: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu for Delhi on May 11
content: The Chief Minister is scheduled to meet Union Ministers Amit Shah and C.R. Patil, and later participate in the CII Business Summit

title: PM should not make a big issue out of power tussle inside Congress, says Satish Jarkiholi
content: BJP criticises our guarantees here but uses them to win polls elsewhere, claims Public Works Minister

title: Andhra Pradesh govt.’s move to help local products earn global brand recognition
content: The State initiates steps to develop Product Perfection Clusters in the Amaravati, Visakhapatnam and Tirupati economic regions to provide necessary support to industries, especially MSMEs, conforming to quality control standards, creating advanced logistics networks, doing international benchmarking and integrating them into the production cycle

title: Opposition mounts over move to secure technical sanction for West Hill STP project
content: District Collector issues the direction at a recent meeting attended by officials from the Kozhikode Corporation, District Suchitwa Mission, State Pollution Control Board, and Local Self-Government department to initiate steps to obtain technical sanction for the project

title: India, Trinidad and Tobago sign eight MoUs during Jaishankar visit
content: Agreements on tourism, healthcare, infrastructure and Ayurveda signed during External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar’s two-day visit, as both sides review progress on initiatives announced during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit last year

title: Two constituencies with same name led to my loss by a single vote, ex-Minister Periakaruppan claims before HC
content: He says that a postal vote cast in his favour at Tirupattur constituency in Sivaganga district was wrongly despatched to Tirupattur constituency in Tirupattur district

title: Slow progress of overbridge work worsens traffic congestion on Kamaraj Salai
content: The road overbridge, originally conceived in 2005-06, to connect the busy arterial stretches of Kamaraj Salai and Maraimalai Adigal Salai, was hanging fire for several years due to various reasons, including administrative lapses, arbitration and lack of funds.

title: In Kerala, nearly half of Congress’ MLA-elects are young faces
content: Congress decision to field maximum number of youth and student activists brought rich dividends as the young candidates connected well with Gen Z and young voters and won the popular mandate, feels one MLA-elect

title: Marandi seeks NIA probe into gangster Prince Khan’s allegation against Dhanbad SSP
content: BJP leader accuses state police of supporting organised extortion network, demands immediate removal of Dhanbad Senior Superintendent of Police Prabhat Kumar.

title: IMD forecasts new low pressure over Bay of Bengal; thunderstorms likely in A.P. until May 14
content: APSDMA Managing Director Prakhar Jain issues a caution asking people to avoid staying in open areas and to take shelter in safe buildings, while farmers have been advised to take necessary precautions during agricultural activities

title: Vande Mataram song during Vijay’s swearing-in ceremony: CPI questions relegation of Tamil Thaai Vaazhthu
content: Mr. Veerapandian said the Tamil invocation should be rendered first when newly-elected MLAs take oath, followed by the national anthem. “This practice should be followed in all government functions,” he added.

title: Youth held for attacking man with hammer in Pudukad in Thrissur
content: Cyril of  Potta was taken into custody for attacking Deenas Davis, a native of Marathakkara; victim critical after head injuries

title: Repair Medigadda, make use of Kaleshwaram project to weather El Nino ahead
content: Harish Rao says the project helped overcome such drought conditions in the past too when BRS was in power

title: Ganesh Kumar alleges UDF-BJP deal in Pathanapuram
content: Ganesh Kumar pointed to a significant and ‘suspicious’ drop in the BJP’s vote share as primary evidence of cross-voting intended to consolidate the anti-LDF front

title: Long-stalled skywalk finds new momentum amidst political turnaround
content: According to Kottayam MLA Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan, the project will be taken up on a priority basis once the new State cabinet assumes charge

title: NIT-C revamping MTech programmes, to launch two courses in 2026-27
content: The revamped MTech programme introduces a comprehensive set of specialisations aimed at addressing the current and future needs of the engineering sector

title: No intent to insult, says Apu Joseph amid KC(M) protest
content: Kerala Congress leader and MLA-elect says his statement about welcoming Kerala Congress (M) with open arms was was driven by a genuine wish that K.M. Mani’s party should not fade away

title: Officials fined for delay in furnishing information under RTI Act
content: Penalties imposed during hearings in April against officials who failed to respond to notices issued by the commission or neglected providing information sought by applicants, says Information Commissioner

title: Ageing ornamental trees behind mass uprooting during rains in Bengaluru
content: Experts say these trees required a focused management approach, including pruning and removal, which has not been carried out over the years

title: CEC Gyanesh Kumar calls for greater voter participation to strengthen democracy
content: The peaceful conduct of the Assembly elections in various States recently reflects the strength of India’s electoral system, says the Chief Election Commissioner

title: Kerala State Electricity Board proposes new set of standard operating procedures for power distribution wing
content: SOP’s primary objective is to ensure safe, efficient and reliable operation of distribution network, minimise supply interruptions and to ensure that all the statutory and regulatory frameworks are complied with

title: Telangana CM seeks PMO special task force for speedy clearances of States’ projects
content: Requests Hyderabad Metro Rail, Future City Musi rejuvenation and other Telangana projects to be cleared

title: Manipur Naga bodies seek PM’s ‘personal’ intervention against armed Kuki groups aiding external aggression
content: The civil society groups said that the use of drones, rocket launchers, and other military-grade weapons, along with reports that armed cadres crossed the India-Myanmar border, pointed to a well-coordinated foreign-backed assault

title: 'Don’t begin by claiming govt is broke': Ex-CM Stalin's message to newly elected Vijay
content: Tamil Nadu's new Chief Minister Vijay claimed the previous government left a Rs 10 lakh crore debt and an empty treasury. However, former CM M.K. Stalin refuted this, stating the state's debt is within limits and urging Vijay not to start his tenure with such claims. Vijay vowed transparency and prioritizing public welfare.

title: 92,000+ layoffs signal how AI era is driving job cuts and rise of 50-person unicorns
content: Over 92,000 tech jobs vanished in 2026, pushing the total since 2020 to nearly 900,000. Giants like Meta and Microsoft are cutting thousands, signaling a structural shift driven by AI efficiencies and pandemic over-hiring. Despite massive layoffs, tech titans are investing billions in AI, while startups achieve rapid growth with leaner teams, redefining business expansion in the AI era.

title: ‘Fuel price hike inevitable’: State-run oil firms lose over Rs 1 lakh cr in 10 weeks
content: State-owned oil companies are facing over Rs 1 lakh crore in losses due to soaring global fuel prices, with daily under-recoveries reaching Rs 1,700 crore. Despite this, petrol and diesel prices remain unchanged, impacting the financial health of these crucial energy providers. A fuel price hike now appears inevitable, with the government facing a political decision on timing and extent.

title: 'Use petrol, gas with great restraint': PM Modi's appeal amid US-Iran war, Hormuz blockade
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi called for careful use of petrol, diesel, and gas. He stated that reducing reliance on imported fuel will help India manage the ongoing war's effects. The Prime Minister also highlighted India's focus on energy security and investments in solar power. Several infrastructure projects worth around Rs 9,400 crore were inaugurated in Telangana.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: 'Play Tamil song before Vande Mataram': Row erupts over TN CM Vijay's swearing in event
content: CPI state secretary M Veerapandiyan has objected to the order of songs played at Tamil Nadu CM Vijay's swearing-in ceremony, where 'Tamil Thaai Vaazhthu' was placed third after 'Vande Mataram' and the national anthem. He stated this violates long-standing convention and demanded a public explanation for the lapse, urging the government to restore the state song's primacy.

title: Happy Mother's day: Top 100 wishes, messages, images, GIFs and greetings card
content: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: Urvil Patel scripts history, smashes joint-fastest fifty in IPL
content: Urvil Patel unleashed an explosive batting display, smashing 25 runs off Avesh Khan in the fifth over and another 25 off Digvesh Rathi in the sixth. He became the first batter in IPL history to hit six sixes in his first eight balls, racing to 41. Patel then achieved a breathtaking half-century in just 13 balls, equalling the IPL record.

title: Accenture CEO says companies are investing in AI, but adoption challenges remain
content: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet highlights a growing gap in Corporate America's AI integration, noting increased investment but lagging operational adoption.  The company is restructuring its operating model and workforce strategy, even tying employee promotions to AI proficiency, to accelerate AI-driven transformation. This proactive approach mirrors past digital shifts but is being implemented at a faster pace.

title: YouTuber Anurag Dwivedi’s lavish wedding party that invited ED to a dark underbelly
content: A popular YouTuber's lavish lifestyle, including a Dubai cruise wedding, has drawn the Enforcement Directorate's attention. Investigators allege his empire was built on illegal betting promotions and money laundering. The case highlights the blurred lines between fantasy sports and betting, and the regulatory gaps exploited by online platforms.

title: North Korea prepares nuclear dead man's switch; what prompted dangerous move?
content: North Korea has amended its constitution, mandating an automatic nuclear strike if leader Kim Jong-un is assassinated or incapacitated by foreign adversaries. This revision, prompted by concerns over recent decapitation attacks in Iran, formalizes retaliatory procedures. The move underscores Pyongyang's heightened security fears amid evolving geopolitical threats.

title: Oil slick near Kharg Island? Iran's crude industry at breaking point amid US blockade
content: An oil spill near Iran's Kharg Island, the country's primary oil export hub, has raised concerns amid a US naval blockade. Satellite images show a significant oil slick, potentially amounting to 3,000 barrels lost. This incident occurs as Iran faces a storage crisis due to the blockade, with capacity nearing its limit.

title: Who is Urvil Patel? CSK batter who smashed joint-fastest IPL fifty in 13 balls
content: Urvil Patel etched his name in IPL history by smashing a 13-ball half-century for Chennai Super Kings against Lucknow Super Giants. This explosive innings equalled Yashasvi Jaiswal's record for the fastest fifty in the tournament. Patel, a 27-year-old wicketkeeper-batter from Gujarat, has a proven track record of rapid scoring in domestic cricket.

title: 'Yeh lo ... ': New dad Suryakumar Yadav distributes sweets before RCB clash
content: Suryakumar Yadav celebrated the birth of his daughter by distributing sweets to the paparazzi at Mumbai airport ahead of the IPL 2026 clash against RCB. He will lead Mumbai Indians in the absence of Hardik Pandya, whose fitness is being monitored. The team faces a crucial match to boost playoff hopes.

title: Indian mangoes for trophy: Singapore festival rewards performers as India pushes exports
content: Singapore's cultural festival saw Indian mangoes as the star attraction, with performers receiving boxes of the prized fruit. Organized by the Indian High Commission, the event aimed to boost mango exports and offered a taste of "Incredible India." This initiative, part of a broader strategy to promote premium varieties globally, has generated significant enthusiasm and curiosity among residents.

title: Sooryavanshi gets brutal reality check from Hayden- ‘Need to...’
content: Matthew Hayden praised young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 36 off 16 balls but stressed the need for longer innings when chasing big totals. He highlighted Gujarat Titans' consistent top-order batting, balancing aggression with longevity, as key to their success. Shubman Gill's 84 led Gujarat to a commanding 229/6, ultimately securing a 77-run victory.

title: Gold, silver outlook: Precious metals likely to remain range-bound amid US-Iran peace talks
content: Gold and silver prices are expected to trade within a narrow band this week, with investors closely watching US-Iran peace talks and key global economic data. Analysts noted that while gold's momentum appears steady, silver shows positive movement.  Geopolitical tensions and central bank buying are also influencing precious metal markets.

title: Watch: Youth jumps into 'Badi Deg' at Ajmer Sharif Dargah, beaten up by crowd
content: A young man caused a stir at Ajmer Sharif Dargah on Sunday by allegedly jumping into the 'Badi Deg' cauldron, which contained cash and jewellery. Shrine staff intervened and pulled him out, with preliminary reports suggesting he may be mentally unstable. Authorities are investigating the incident captured on CCTV, with no major injuries reported.

title: Neeru Bajwa, mom of 3 on Mother's Day 2026: ‘Motherhood taught me to say No'’
content: Punjabi star Neeru Bajwa, mother of three, revealed how motherhood instilled confidence and the courage to say 'no,' a lesson she wishes for her daughters.  She emphasizes humility and kindness as core house rules, aiming to raise normal, grounded children. Bajwa also consciously shields her girls from industry pressures, promoting healthy living and self-expression over unrealistic standards.

title: Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini drama takes wild turn with Aaron Rodgers
content: Aaron Rodgers and his mystery wife Brittani became unexpected talking points in the growing Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy after a viral social media post joked that no photos of Rodgers’ wife exist online. Fans flooded social media with conspiracy jokes about Brittani’s secrecy while Rodgers continues negotiating with the Pittsburgh Steelers ahead of the 2026 NFL season.

title: Virat Kohli is scoring faster than ever — so why are RCB struggling?
content: In the first five matches, RCB batters from No. 4 to No. 8 averaged 39.30 and scored at a strike rate of 190.77, both the best among all teams. They scored two fifties while hitting 23 fours and 33 sixes. But in the next five matches, the numbers dropped sharply. The average fell to 21, the worst among all teams in that period, while the strike rate dropped to 148.58.

title: Stock markets likely to stay volatile this week amid US-Iran tensions, crude oil concerns
content: Indian markets brace for volatility this week, driven by US-Iran tensions and crude oil price swings. Investors will also scrutinize crucial inflation data from India and the US for interest rate clues.  Key corporate earnings are also on the radar, alongside foreign investor activity, shaping market sentiment.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay resigns from Trichy East, retains Perambur seat
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and TVK chief Vijay has resigned from the Tiruchirappalli East assembly seat, opting to retain Perambur. Sworn in earlier, Vijay pledged to usher in an era of "real, secular and social justice." He emphasized his connection to ordinary people, promising only achievable goals and expressing confidence in collective strength to overcome challenges.

title: From BBM to Threema: How messaging apps and VPNs fuel terror networks in Jammu and Kashmir
content: Blackberry Messenger (BBM) has resurfaced in terror networks in Jammu and Kashmir, with a Lashkar-e-Taiba operative revealing its use alongside other secure apps like Element, Threema, and Dust. The National Investigation Agency is now investigating the use of these platforms by terrorists to coordinate activities.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship passengers start disembarking in Spain, to be checked for symptoms
content: Passengers from a quarantined cruise ship, the MV Hondius, began disembarking off Tenerife after a hantavirus outbreak linked to the Andes strain. Three deaths and five positive cases were reported, prompting an international evacuation and medical screening for over 140 individuals on board.

title: '168 children that your boss killed ... ': Iran 'congratulates' White House press secretary over baby news
content: Iran congratulated White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt on her newborn daughter while referencing the deadly US-backed strikes on an Iranian school in Minab. The Iranian Embassy in Armenia urged Leavitt to "think of the mothers" of the 168 children killed in the attack, which occurred during Operation Epic Fury.

title: Inside ‘mommy brain’: How pregnancy and childbirth rewire the maternal mind
content: Pregnancy and childbirth trigger significant physiological, psychological, and emotional transformations in women, often leading to "mommy brain" characterized by forgetfulness and mental fog. Scientific studies reveal neural recalibration, not decline, as the brain adapts to caregiving demands. This experience, while common, requires understanding and support for new mothers navigating identity shifts and cognitive loads.

title: Tragedy re-run: Returning from IPL match, 2 childhood friends die after car hits bike in Delhi
content: A somber incident unfolded in northeast Delhi when two young men, Rohit Kashyap (31) and Hemant Sharma (33), tragically lost their lives in a shocking hit-and-run following an IPL match.

title: Kiddnapped at knifepoint, 11-year-old gang-raped in Ayodhya
content: In Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, an 11-year-old girl was allegedly kidnapped and gang-raped during a village function. Police have detained two men in their mid-20s after the survivor recounted the harrowing ordeal. The incident occurred when the girl was taken at knife-point to a deserted location and later abandoned near a canal. Legal proceedings are ongoing.

title: Gujarat shocker: 30-year-old’s ‘surprise’ visit to pregnant wife ends in road tragedy
content: A 30-year-old man, Samir Panchal, tragically died when his car caught fire on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway near Vadodara. He was en route to Bilimora to surprise his pregnant wife and bring her home. The vehicle reportedly first collided with a crash barrier before erupting in flames.

title: CBSE Class 12 results to be out soon: What students must know before scorecards
content: A “CBSE Class 12 Results 2026 Coming Soon” banner on DigiLocker has fuelled expectations that the Central Board of Secondary Education may announce Class 12 board results shortly. Students will be able to access provisional marksheets through official CBSE portals, DigiLocker and other digital platforms once the results are declared.

title: Student from Hyderabad dies of electrocution at IIT-Patna
content: A tragic accident on the IIT-Patna campus claimed the life of 21-year-old BTech student Sadasivuni Harshith Patnaik. While retrieving a cricket ball, he was electrocuted by a live electric pole. Harshith, a dual degree student at IIM Bombay, had returned to attend his batchmates' farewell. The institute expressed deep sorrow and is investigating the incident.

title: 'Going to entertain': Ashwin backs Sooryavanshi to become all-format superstar
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has lauded Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, calling him a "box-office player" with the potential to represent India in all three formats. Despite RR's loss, Sooryavanshi impressed with his fearless batting, scoring 440 runs at a strike rate of 236.56 this IPL season.

title: 'New era of real, secular, social justice starts now': TVK chief Vijay's first speech as Tamil Nadu CM
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam chief C Joseph Vijay assumed office as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, promising a new era of secular and social justice governance. He highlighted the inherited financial strain, pledging transparency, strict action against corruption and drug abuse, and prioritizing education, roads, and water facilities for the people.

title: Evacuation Begins For Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship In Spain's Canary Islands
content: Three passengers from the MV Hondius, a Dutch husband and wife and a German woman, have died, while others have fallen sick with the rare disease, which usually spreads among rodents.

title: Iraq Never Knew Its Desert Was Hiding An Israeli Military Base
content: The installation housed Israeli special forces and functioned as a logistical hub for the Israeli air force.

title: After Bengal, BJP Preps For UP, Goes For Social Reset With Cabinet Reshuffle
content: With the Cabinet expansion, the Uttar Pradesh BJP has sought to mollify upset castes and turncoats and tried to strike a regional balance.

title: "Open Hooliganism": Punjab BJP Slams AAP After Alleged Attack On Leaders
content: Punjab BJP president Ashwani Sharma on Sunday launched a sharp attack on the Arvind Kejriwal-led Aam Aadmi Party, alleging that AAP workers and leaders turned a political protest into "open hooliganism" by attacking BJP offices and leaders in Punjab.

title: Mother's Day Massacre: UP Man Guns Down Mother, Brother In Rage Over Land
content: The accused is on the run after killing his mother and brother. The police said four teams have been formed to search for him

title: Mamata Banerjee Faces Unprecedented Dissent After Trinamool's Poll Defeat
content: TMC spokesperson Riju Dutta, who often represented the party on debate panels, released a video on his X handle apologising to Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari.

title: Himanta Sarma Stakes Claim To Form Government In Assam
content: Jagat Prakash Nadda addressed reporters on Sunday at Lok Bhawan after the BJP Legislature Party unanimously elected Himanta Biswa Sarma as its leader for a second consecutive term and staked claim to form the government.

title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: 9 Dead As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Truce
content: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

title: "Society More Powerful Than Government": PM Modi At Art Of Living Event
content: Addressing a large gathering at the event, the Prime Minister spoke about spirituality, public participation in nation-building, environmental protection and the role of youth in shaping a developed India.

title: "Full Faith": Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora-Linked Firm Refutes Probe Agency Charges
content: The company said it entered the mobile phone export business in May 2023 in line with the Government of India's "Make in India" initiative and the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme.

title: India's Rail Waitlist Crisis: Over 3 Crore People Missed Travel In 2025-26
content: RTI replies from the Railways reveal that 3.39 crore passengers could not travel in FY 2025-26 after their waitlisted tickets remained unconfirmed and were automatically cancelled

title: MK Stalin Jabs Vijay Over "Rs 10 Lakh Crore Debt" Claim After Oath Ceremony
content: MK Stalin defended the state's financial management by enumerating various expenditures by his government over five years.

title: Rahul Gandhi Wants KC Venugopal As Kerala Chief Minister, Meets Him Privately: Sources
content: Before Congress leaders officially met at party chief Mallikarjun Kharge's place in Delhi, Rahul Gandhi met KC Venugopal separately, sources said

title: A UPI Payment At Toll Plaza That May Lead Cops To Suvendu Adhikari Aide's Killers
content: Chandranath Rath, a close aide of West Bengal's new Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, was shot dead on a busy road on Wednesday.

title: Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora Gets 7-Day Probe Agency Custody In Money Laundering Case
content: Sanjeev Arora was produced before the court at around 11:20 pm on Friday night. While the ED had sought 10 days' custodial interrogation, the court granted seven days of ED custody.

title: From Tiger State To Wildlife State, How Madhya Pradesh Is Rewriting India's Conservation Map
content: While the state is known as India’s “Tiger State,” it is now focusing on protecting many other animals too, including cheetahs, wild buffaloes, crocodiles and turtles

title: Vijay Makes 'Only 1 Power' Pitch In Tamil Nadu, Thanks DMK Allies For Support
content: In his first address as the Chief Minister, Vijay said, "There will be no power centre other than me. I will be the only centre of power" - asserting control over his decision-making.

title: Hantavirus-stricken Cruise Ship Arrives At Tenerife In Spain's Canary Islands
content: Everyone disembarking will be checked for symptoms, and will only be taken off the ship once evacuation flights are ready to fly them to their destinations.
